## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Lovable Templates project and address blockers](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gallery and template progress is good; need to show Lovable team updates ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Marcel's high-quality template workflow needs to be understood and replicated](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Team aims to deliver 5-10 website templates, gallery experience, and SEO strategy by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [CMS (DCAP) access is needed; George to push for team access](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

## Topics

### Project Progress and Blockers

  - [No preview app available, limiting ability to share progress with Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Nicolas created a password-protected render deployment, but using it may be ethically questionable](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Team to push for a Netlify link from Lovable for continuous availability](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [George encourages pushing for tools that make the team's work easier](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Gallery and Template Development

  - [Georgemaine built out gallery functionality and homepage visual design](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Detail page follows Sebastian's notion-like two-column layout](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Features include live preview, screenshots, sections, backlinks, styles, and related templates](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Nicolas developed variations based on Next.js blog template](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Marcel produced high-quality template; team aims to understand his workflow](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Template Quality and Reproduction

  - [Gap exists between Marcel's template quality and current workflow output](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Nicolas working on script to automate iterations with Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Georgemaine can help refine design to improve quality](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Team confident in ability to produce variations, with room for quality improvement](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

### Timeline and Deliverables

  - [Aim to send 5-10 templates to Lovable by Monday EOD for async review](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Wednesday meeting to deliver on promised templates, gallery experience, and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Ada working on template and keyword strategy for categories, due Monday EOD](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

### CMS Access

  - [Team needs access to DCAP CMS used for blog or community](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [George to push Lovable for providing access](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Georgemaine to record and share Loom of gallery progress](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Nicolas to work with Daniel on alternative sharing solution if needed](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [George to contact Marcel about his template workflow](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [George to push for DCAP CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Team to prepare 5-10 templates by Monday EOD](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [George to send update to Lovable by EOD with progress (gallery Loom + template example)](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Deliver templates, gallery experience, and SEO strategy by Wednesday meeting](https://fathom.video/share/5BvuUU7Jt4g38ygYb9FmZfVN7zTz2vF_?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
